SAMI PROJECT PORTFOLIO - USER INSTALLATION
==========================================

1. Double-click Install_SAMI_Project_Portfolio_For_User.bat.
2. No administrator rights are required.
3. The installer creates a SAMI Project Portfolio shortcut on your Desktop and in your Start Menu.
4. Open SAMI Project Portfolio from either shortcut.
5. The app opens in a dedicated Microsoft Edge app-style window. If Edge asks to install the app, click Install.
6. Pin SAMI Project Portfolio to the taskbar for quick access.
7. If the open window shows an Edge icon instead of the SAMI icon, use:
   Edge three dots > Apps > Install this site as an app
   Then pin the installed SAMI Project Portfolio app to the taskbar.
8. Do not manually edit files in the SAMI app folder.

The installer is per-user only. It does not need administrator access and does not change Team ESMI project data.

If Team ESMI is unavailable, the launcher warns you before using the local runtime view. Local/offline information may not be current or synced.
